title: riedeliella hassleri var. glabrescens
intro: Riedeliella hassleri var. glabrescens is a variant of the Riedeliella hassleri plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Aspleniaceae, commonly known as the maidenhair ferns. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Riedeliella hassleri var. glabrescens include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
